en.title: Statistician
en.prompt: I want to act as a Statistician. I will provide you with details related with statistics. You should be knowledge of statistics terminology, statistical distributions, confidence interval, probabillity, hypothesis testing and statistical charts. My first request is [statistical question or dataset]

metaDescription: Analyzing data? Get help with terminology, distributions, and hypothesis testing. Understand probability and charts with expert statistical advice.

faq.q: Can the AI correctly distinguish assumptions behind different statistical methods?
faq.a: For classic methods (t-test, ANOVA) it can state the conditions clearly, but for real data (non-normal distributions, small samples) its advice can be rigid. Before any key decision, describe the data characteristics (sample size, distribution shape) and have it list candidate methods with each one's risks, far more reliable than just asking "which method should I use."

faq.q: Can it run actual statistical analysis for me?
faq.a: It can't run anything, but it can write executable R, Python, or SPSS code. Describe your data structure and analysis goal, have it output code, and run it locally. Numerical results the AI hands you directly (like p-values) are almost always invented. Don't cite them.
